screenshots.description: Sidepanel Operar tab at idle state. Should show NODAL OS header, 4-tab navigation, instruction textarea, and Estado/Target Resolution/Verification/Timeline surfaces.
screenshots.captureInstructions: Open sidepanel, click Operar tab, wait for idle state, screenshot the full panel.

screenshots.description: Sidepanel Runtime tab disconnected state. Should show host/port fields, connect button, token setup card or advanced section, Motor local status.
screenshots.captureInstructions: Click Runtime tab, do not press Conectar, screenshot the full panel.

screenshots.description: Handoff surface in Operar tab. Only visible when a run triggers human intervention. If not triggerable in this QA pass, this screenshot may be skipped.
screenshots.captureInstructions: Start a run, trigger a handoff condition, screenshot the handoff surface. Or mark as not-applicable if bridge not running.

screenshots.description: DevTools Console tab immediately after sidepanel loads. Must show 0 red errors. Expected: loadConfig messages, possibly WebSocket connection refused (benign).
screenshots.captureInstructions: Right-click sidepanel > Inspect, click Console tab, clear console, reload extension, screenshot immediately after load.

screenshots.description: DevTools Console after pressing Conectar then disconnecting (bridge not running expected). Should show connection attempt and graceful fallback, no uncaught errors.
screenshots.captureInstructions: Press Conectar, wait 2s, press Conectar again to disconnect, screenshot console.
